nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: The panel gathers at the bottom of the screen like a dark layer of paint.

nodes.speaker: Logic
nodes.text: Speaker, portrait, typewriter reveal, and accent styling are responding to the same data node.

nodes.speaker: Narration
nodes.text: The choice resolves without any Chapter 0 gameplay integration.

nodes.speaker: Conscience
nodes.text: A reusable interface should make its purpose clear without borrowing another game's identity.
